title: 10M Heavy Duty Braided Cotton Washing Line - Weatherproof Outdoor Clothes Rope for Garden & Camping, UV Drying Laundry Line with High Tensile Strength, Multipurpose Craft Rope
features: Natural cotton rope design: This braided washing line uses natural cotton material, and the inner core is synthetic polypropylene, which is moderately soft and easy to knot. When drying clothes, the clothes will not leave wrinkles, keeping your clothes flat and clean.

Versatile use: This washing line is not only suitable for outdoor clothes drying, but also suitable for arts and crafts, camping or multiple uses indoors/outdoors. It is an ideal choice for your home and outdoor activities.

Thick rope structure: This thick rope adopts a strong and synthetic fiber core, providing strong support, will not loosen or break, and can be used for a long time without damage, making it a reliable daily item.
Soft and stain-free: This washing line is designed to be soft and will not leave any stains or marks on clothes. Even if you hang it in the sun for a long time, your clothes will stay clean and tidy.
Size: The rope is elastic and can be stretched to a length of 10 meters, with a thickness of 6 mm, to meet different space and usage needs, allowing you to easily choose the right length.
